title: loadng/discovery.py: _prune_seen called on every suppression check
description:
src/lichen/loadng/discovery.py:194-197 _is_suppressed() calls _prune_seen(now) on every incoming RREQ. _prune_seen iterates all seen entries.

Fix: Prune lazily (on a timer or after N checks) rather than on every call. Stale entries don't affect correctness; they only waste memory.
